title: Autonomous Researcher MVP loop proof v0
problem: Strategic pivot from Atlas/frontend/docs work to autonomous researcher with self-upgrading ticket loop. Need one closed mock-safe proof: seed question → research → private atlas → coherence → quality verdict → improvement ticket recommendation.
acceptance_criteria: One complete mock fixture-mode researcher loop demonstrated via module + CLI.
Private atlas snapshot and coherence report artifacts produced.
Research quality verdict GO/PARTIAL/NO-GO with weakest dimension identified.
At least one concrete improvement ticket recommended from observed evidence.
Golden tests, full pytest, safety audit, and public-site build pass.
No public routes, schema migrations, or frontend UI changes.
non_goals: Principal audit ticket-331 (docs-only; skipped per pivot).
Live OpenAlex or live Ollama in CI.
Auto-promote improvement tickets without human review.
rollback_plan: Revert autonomous loop modules, CLI command, and tests; remove ticket-333 seed.
